metadata.name: New Module
metadata.description: The royal treasury was plundered and its relics hidden in dungeons across the realm. Reclaim them and return them to the vault in Ravenglen.

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Ravenglen
towns.description: A sleepy village surrounded by ancient oaks and whispering meadows.

key_dungeons.name: Crumbling Mines
key_dungeons.description: A spiral staircase carved from bedrock descends into Crumbling Mines. The temperature drops with every step.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Venture into Crumbling Mines and liberate the Crystal Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: The artifact pulses with ancient energy.
